body.para: These are legacy DEC / PC disk interconnects, included here for reference. None is present on the DS10, which uses the CY82C693 IDE / ATAPI channel exclusively; they are not modeled by EmulatR.

list.li: -SDI (Standard Disk Interconnect) -- the serial interface DEC used between an HSC / KDM controller and RA-series disks on large VAX systems.
DSSI (Digital Storage Systems Interconnect) -- a multi-host bus used to share RF-series disks across clustered VAX / Alpha nodes.
ST506 -- the early MFM / RLL hard-disk interface of the PC / workstation era, predating IDE.

body.para: [TODO: confirm whether any of these are planned for a non-DS10 platform profile; otherwise this page stays reference-only.]
